author: anon-b5959f1a
content: Implementation complete: src/acp.rs (ACP server module) + CLI subcommand in main.rs + module registration in lib.rs. All 530 tests pass, zero warnings. Features: all stable ACP methods, tool delegation via fs/terminal client methods, bidirectional JSON-RPC transport, streaming provider responses as session/update notifications, SessionManager wrapping, full config inheritance.
